---
title: "Week 10: Agentic AI II"
subtitle: "Orchestration, Memory, and Governance"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Reading Assignment
Complete this reading before Week 11.
:::

## Overview

*Content coming soon.*

## Key Concepts

- Multi-agent orchestration
- Agent memory systems
- Tool integration
- AI governance patterns

## Further Reading

- [Langchain](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/overview)
- [Vercel AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs/introduction)
- [LLM Powered Agents](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/)
- [What is RAG](https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/what-is-retrieval-augmented-generation/)
